title: Sterile Processing Technician
description: Support Biogen's clinical operations as a Sterile Processing Technician, ensuring instruments are properly cleaned and sterilized.
responsibilities: Clean and decontaminate surgical instruments following protocols
Operate sterilization equipment and monitor sterilization cycles
Prepare instrument trays and maintain inventory
Maintain sterile field standards and infection control
Document sterilization records and equipment maintenance

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
